title: Ghost (Death Watch)

The '''Ghosts''' were a unit of elite [[Soldier/Legends|soldiers]] within<ref name="Galaxies" /> the radical [[Mandalorian/Legends|Mandalorian]] splinter group<ref name="HotM">{{InsiderCite|80|The History of the Mandalorians: Exploring the Evolution of a Mighty Race of Warriors}}</ref> known as the [[Death Watch/Legends|Death Watch]]. Clad in [[Mandalorian armor/Legends|Mandalorian armor]] [[Color/Legends|colored]] in black,<ref name="Galaxies" /> a color traditionally associated with the concept of justice in the Mandalorian culture,<ref name="TMPaC">{{InsiderCite|86|The Mandalorians: People and Culture}}</ref> the Ghosts were based out of the [[Death/Legends|Death]] Watch's [[Death Watch bunker|hidden bunker]] on the [[Tree/Legends|forest]] [[Moon/Legends|moon]] of [[Endor/Legends|Endor]]. One member of the Ghosts, [[Rageon Vart]], was tasked with overseeing the entrance to Section A of the Death Watch base. Around the [[Standard year/Legends|year]] [[1 ABY/Legends|1 ABY]], several Death Watch Ghosts engaged a number of [[Spacer/Legends|spacers]] who attempted to intrude into the base. Vart was killed, and his [[Keycard/Legends|pass key]] taken by the spacers to gain access to the areas formerly under his supervision.<ref name="Galaxies" />

==Behind the scenes==
The Ghosts first appeared in ''[[Star Wars]]'' [[canon]] in the [[Star Wars video games|massively multiplayer online role-playing game]] ''[[Star Wars Galaxies]]'', beginning with it's updated release, ''An Empire Divided''.
